query: SELECT DATE(createdAt) as data, COUNT(*) as total_analises, COUNT(DISTINCT nomeLoja) as lojas_distintas FROM analises_stock GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY data DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT DATE(createdAt) as data, COUNT(*) as total_analises, COUNT(DISTINCT nomeLoja) as lojas_distintas FROM analises_stock GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY data DESC;
